content: Set up project: install Python/Node deps, configure SQLAlchemy models, DB init
Build auth system: User model, JWT, bcrypt, login/register/logout routes, middleware
Build Lead + Activity models and CRUD API routes with business logic (scoring, status transitions)
Build frontend: auth pages, routing, layout, and API client
Build frontend: Dashboard page with KPI cards and follow-up widgets
Build frontend: Leads list page with search/filter/sort
Build frontend: Lead create/detail pages with scoring and timeline
Seed data + test scoring/status logic + verify end-to-end
